description_long: This is a pair of ornate dangle earrings featuring an intricate, filigree-style gold-toned metalwork as the main body. Suspended from each earring are three decorative beads: a large oval bead with a metallic green and black striped finish, a round blue bead with a glittery surface, and a smaller brown bead. The earrings are attached to gold-colored fishhook ear wires, making them suitable for pierced ears. The filigree design is symmetrical and floral-inspired, with openwork patterns that add elegance and lightness. The beads dangle freely, adding movement and a playful touch to the overall design. The combination of metallic, glassy, and possibly resin materials gives the earrings a rich, multi-textured appearance.
description: A pair of ornate gold-toned filigree dangle earrings with green-striped oval beads, blue glittery beads, and small brown accents, suspended from fishhook ear wires.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings with full visibility of the filigree pattern and all three dangling beads on each earring.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the earrings and the alignment of the beads, with the filigree pattern mostly edge-on and less visible.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, clearly displaying the symmetrical filigree design and the arrangement of the beads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the profile of the earrings and the vertical alignment of the beads, with the filigree pattern mostly hidden.
